Offers & seasons

A handful of direct-only rates for the unhurried, the spontaneous and the long-stayers. Every one booked direct — the price you see is the price you pay.

Stay 4, pay 34 rooms left

The long weekend

Book four nights or more on a single stay and the fourth is on the house — any room, any season.

Sun–ThuAny room

Midweek in the city

Arrive Sunday to Thursday and take 15% off the nightly rate, with a slow checkout until 2pm.

Within-7-days rate

Plans came together late? Take 20% off any available room for arrivals inside the next week.

Just marriedThe Executive Suite

Honeymoon nights

A bottle of MCC on arrival, a couple's spa ritual and breakfast in bed on three-night stays.

R6,800+ extras on us

Cape Town local's rate

A staycation rate for our neighbours, with a sundowner on the roof and late checkout thrown in.

The slow summer

Settle in for a week or more and take 25% off, with a mid-stay spa treatment and laundry included.

Be first to hear the next offer

Our best rates rarely last a week. Leave your email and we'll let you know the moment one opens.

Join the listSee the rooms
RRoyal Hotel

A contemporary grand hotel in the heart of Cape Town. City-view rooms and suites, a rooftop pool and spa, and a calmer way to stay in the city.
